channel.title: Mint Street
channel.description: Latest news from Mint Street - Hyderabad, Telangana, India and World

item.title: India Auto Retail Sales Hit Record 2.61M Units April | Mint Street
item.description: India's auto retail sector soared to a new record with 2.61 million units sold in April, fueled by robust PV demand. Get the latest FADA data & market insights.

item.title: Giorgia Meloni Denounces AI Deepfakes After Viral Misinformation...
item.description: The controversy erupted when a fabricated image-placing her in a compromising, non-institutional setting-went viral, with users sharing it as if it were real and questioning her conduct.

item.description: The Chief Minister, in a statement, thanked the PM and Union railway minister Ashwini Vaishnaw for issuing the notification.

item.title: Lexus India Extends Warranty Coverage To Eight Years For All New...
item.description: “Extending our vehicle warranty is a direct reflection of the confidence we have in every vehicle we bring to India,” said Hikaru Ikeuchi, President of Lexus India.

item.title: Ambati Rayudu Appointed Head of Cricketing Operations for HCA
item.description: Rayudu announced his new role on Tuesday, thanking the association’s leadership for the opportunity. The appointment has been cleared by Justice P. Naveen Rao (SMC), HCA Secretary M. Jeevan Reddy, and the Apex Council
item.category: former India international player Ambati Rayudu

item.title: These are ways for excellent management!
item.description: దేశంలో ప్రాధాన్యమున్న చదువుల్లో మేనేజ్‌మెంట్‌ కోర్సులు ముఖ్యమైనవి. ఈ విభాగంలో ఇండియన్‌ ఇన్‌స్టిట్యూట్‌ ఆఫ్‌ మేనేజ్‌మెంట్‌(ఐఐఎం)లు పేరున్న సంస్థలు. Management Studies: మేటి మేనేజ్‌మెంట్‌కు మార్గాలివీ | integrated-management-studies-courses-for-intermediate-students

item.title: Promotion in Telugu... Victory as an MLA!
item.description:
An unnamed political candidate has successfully secured an MLA seat in the recently concluded assembly elections. Their electoral triumph followed a robust campaign strategy executed predominantly in Telugu.

item.title: IPL 2026: Samson Powers Chennai Super Kings To 8-Wicket Win Over DC
item.description:
Chennai Super Kings (CSK) achieved a resounding eight-wicket victory over Delhi Capitals (DC) in an Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 fixture. Sanju Samson delivered a commanding performance, anchoring CSK's successful pursuit of the target.

item.title: Sleep deprivation top killer on ORR, causes 33 pc of accidents
item.description:
The Outer Ring Road (ORR) in Hyderabad is currently experiencing an alarming frequency of five to six accidents every day. This consistent daily toll has prompted significant concern among local authorities and the commuting public.
The high incidence of mishaps on the crucial expressway has raised

item.title: Samson's punch.
item.description: టోర్నీ ఆరంభంలో వరుసగా పరాభవాలు చవిచూసిన చెన్నై.. నెమ్మదిగానే అయినా, క్రమంగా పుంజుకుంటోంది. పది మ్యాచ్‌ల్లో అయిదో విజయంతో ఐపీఎల్‌ 2026లో తన ప్లేఆఫ్స్‌ అవకాశాలకు ఇంకాస్త బలం చేకూర్చుకుంది. CSK vs DC: శాంసన్‌ దంచెన్‌ | chennai-super-kings-wins-against-delhi-capitals-in-ipl-2026

item.title: Vijay has sought our support: In Tamil Nadu, the Congress leader Vijay stands just 10 seats away from forming the government.
item.description: The Congress party has confirmed that actor-politician Vijay, leader of the Tamizhaga Vetri Kazhagam (TVK), has approached them seeking support to form a government in Tamil Nadu. This development comes as the nascent TVK finds itself ten seats short of the required majority to establish a governmen

item.title: To meet Preity Zinta... he ran 80 km! A boy ran a staggering 80 kilometers to fulfill his dream of meeting Bollywood actress Preity Zinta.
item.description: A young boy recently undertook an extraordinary effort, reportedly running an astonishing 80 kilometers, all to fulfill his dream of meeting acclaimed Bollywood actress Preity Zinta. This remarkable display of dedication has drawn considerable attention to the lengths fans will go for their idols.

item.title: NIA Charges Three in ISIS Bioterror Plot
item.description:
The National Investigation Agency (NIA) has formally charged three individuals in connection with an alleged bioterror plot linked to the global terrorist organization ISIS. This action underscores ongoing efforts to counter extremist threats within the nation.

item.title: After the completion of the Elinata Shani, they say it will come together... however, my troubles have only increased? According to the details you provided, your star is Uttarashadha, second quarter, with Capricorn as your zodiac sign and Virgo as your ascendant.
